slides.title: SharedPreferences 🗃️
slides.content:
# SharedPreferences

`SharedPreferences` is used to store small amounts of primitive data (ints, bools, strings, etc.) as key-value pairs.

* Data persists across app restarts.
* Internally uses XML on Android and NSUserDefaults on iOS.
* Add `shared_preferences` package to pubspec.yaml.

quizData.question: What type of data is NOT suitable for SharedPreferences?
quizData.explanation: SharedPreferences is for small key-value data, not large binary blobs.

slides.title: Using SharedPreferences
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use await only when needed

Accessing SharedPreferences is asynchronous, so always await or use then(). Cache the instance if you use it frequently.
